commit.message:
fix(floorplan-2d): move useMemo before early return in ResplanPanel

useMemo was placed after the conditional `return null`, causing React
error #300 (rendered more hooks than previous render). All hooks must
be called unconditionally before any early returns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(floorplan-2d): fix infinite re-render loop in ResplanPanel

getFilteredPlans selector returned new [] on every call when index
was null, causing Zustand's Object.is check to trigger re-renders
indefinitely. Fix by using a stable empty array constant and moving
filtering into useMemo inside the component.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(floorplan-2d): add ResPlan floorplan recommendation panel with 50 plans

Introduce a Plan Library sidebar in the 2D editor that lets users browse
and insert pre-processed residential floorplans from the ResPlan dataset.
Clicking a plan inserts walls, openings, and room zones into the canvas
using the existing mergeSubgraph/addZones infrastructure.

- Python preprocessing script converts ResPlan pickle → WallGraph JSON
- 50 plans with SVG thumbnails and metadata index
- Zustand store, insertion hook, panel + thumbnail components
- Bedroom count filter (All / 1BR / 2BR / 3BR / 4+)
- Toolbar button to toggle Plan Library panel

commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

commit.message:
feat: DB-backed symbol management with admin API (#27)

* fix: switch Docker layer cache from GHCR registry to GitHub Actions cache

Registry cache requires the package to already exist in GHCR, causing 403
on first push. GHA cache avoids this entirely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: DB-backed symbol management with admin API (closes #20)

Replace static config-file symbol list with a Postgres-backed one and
expose a runtime admin HTTP API so symbols can be added or removed
without a redeploy.

New files:
- Domain/Entities/TrackedSymbol.cs — entity with Create() factory
- Domain/Interfaces/ITrackedSymbolRepository.cs — CRUD contract
- Application/Features/Symbols/ — GetTrackedSymbolsQuery,
  AddTrackedSymbolCommand (+ FluentValidation), RemoveTrackedSymbolCommand
  and their handlers; shared TrackedSymbolDto
- Infrastructure/Persistence/Configurations/TrackedSymbolConfiguration.cs
- Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories/TrackedSymbolRepository.cs
- Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories/DbTrackedSymbolsProvider.cs
- Infrastructure/Migrations/20260307120000_AddTrackedSymbolsTable.cs
  (creates table + seeds 15 existing symbols from appsettings.json)
- API/Controllers/SymbolsController.cs — GET/POST/DELETE /api/symbols
- Tests/Application/TrackedSymbolsHandlerTests.cs — 9 new unit tests

Changed:
- Infrastructure/Persistence/AppDbContext.cs — adds TrackedSymbols DbSet
- Infrastructure/Migrations/AppDbContextModelSnapshot.cs — updated
- Infrastructure/DependencyInjection.cs — swaps ConfigTrackedSymbolsProvider
  → DbTrackedSymbolsProvider; registers ITrackedSymbolRepository

All 70 tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Potential fix for code scanning alert no. 16: Missing a summary in documentation comment

Refactor to tree-first architecture: build tree then format

commit.message:
fix: extract attachment URLs from WB events API (message.attachments.images)

WB API returns image URLs in event.message.attachments.images[].url,
not event.downloadID. Fixes attachments never being stored/displayed.
UI now renders WB CDN URLs directly without proxy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(ci): handle go-wrappers linux/arm64 library path mismatch

The go-wrappers module hardcodes -L includes/linux in its CGo directives
but ships arm64 libs in includes/linux-arm64. Copy the correct .so files
before building on arm64 runners.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
fix: signal package-error from %resolve-eval-package for clean handling

Change %resolve-eval-package to signal simple-package-error instead of
simple-error so the package-error handler in %do-repl-eval catches it,
producing a clean message without backtrace.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: assign fixed colors per alert type across all charts

Each category now has a guaranteed constant color regardless of
which other categories are present in the data:
- Missile alert → bright red (#EF4444)
- Hostile UAV   → dark red  (#991B1B)
- Flash         → orange    (#F97316)
- Update        → blue      (#3B82F6)

Extracted getCategoryColor() into lib/chartColors.ts so both
AlertChart and TimeOfDayChart share the same source of truth for
bars, legends, and tooltips.

commit.message:
Code review fixes (#2)

* Update README: fix supported pages list

Remove "Invitation Manager" (not a separate surface; handled by My
Network selectors) and add "Connections list" which is supported via
the .mn-connection-card selector in PAGE_CONFIGS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Add "Why" section to README

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* Code review fixes

- Switch chrome.storage.sync → local: the toggle preference doesn't
  need to sync across devices, and sync storage transmits data through
  Google's servers, contradicting the README privacy claim
- Fix tagCard null titleEl: when no title element is found, badge was
  inserted after the card (as a sibling) instead of inside it; use
  insertAdjacentElement('beforeend') on the card as fallback
- Sync popup keyword list with content.js: popup was showing a subset
  of ~12 fewer keywords than content.js actually uses, so the displayed
  keyword list didn't reflect what was being detected
- Update manifest description to mention outsourcing (not just recruiters)
- Clarify README privacy claim to accurately describe local storage use

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Leads agent — 3-month re-engagement, 103 seed prospects, Monday blast ready

- Seed: 70 → 103 businesses (Western NSW + SEQ/QLD — Goulburn, Armidale,
  Griffith, Sunshine Coast, Gold Coast, Bundaberg, Gladstone, Hervey Bay etc.)
- DAILY_LIMIT bumped 10 → 100 for Monday bulk send
- Greeting: business name addresses → "the business owner or manager";
  single-word (person) names still use "Hi Jake" style
- 3-month re-engagement sequence: cold leads get reengagement_date set (+90 days),
  _run_reengagements() fires "here's what you've missed" email at the 90-day mark,
  then marks lead final-cold (email_count=98, never contacts again)
- DB migration: ALTER TABLE adds reengagement_date to existing leads table
- New _SYSTEM_REENGAGE prompt for 3-month catchup emails

commit.message:
Add Document Intelligence module — Claude Vision OCR + entity extraction

- New /dashboard/documents page with drag-and-drop image upload
- Client-side: instant local preview via browser FileReader (no upload until analysis)
- Server-side: Claude Sonnet 4.6 vision API for full document intelligence
- Extracts: verbatim text, document type, language, dates, entities (persons/orgs/locations)
- Detects classification markers, generates intelligence summary with confidence rating
- API route: /api/documents/analyze — auth, RBAC, and audit logging enforced
- Added 'documents' module to audit_logs constraint and AuditModule type
- DOCUMENTS nav item added to dashboard sidebar

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(presentation): add exit/emphasis animations and expand animation system

- Extend BlockAnimation with optional exit (fadeOut, slideUp, scaleOut, shrinkOut,
  dissolveOut, etc.) and emphasis (pulse, bounce, shake, grow, spin) sub-animations
- Add EXIT_VARIANTS and EMPHASIS_VARIANTS to animation-variants.ts with getter
  functions and full sequence duration calculator
- Expand block-animations.ts: 16 entrance types with CSS keyframes, wipe/dissolve
  support in hidden/visible states, bounceIn easing
- Add 3 new animation presets: slide_cascade, zoom_focus, dramatic_reveal (8 total)
- Refactor AnimationSection to three-tab UI (Entrance / Emphasis / Exit) with
  per-phase type selector and timing controls
- 89 animation-variants tests covering entrance, exit, emphasis, and sequence timing

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 에디터 이미지 UX 개선 3건

1. 이미지만으로 게시글 등록 허용 (텍스트 없이 이미지만 있어도 등록 가능)
2. 본문 이미지 클릭 시 라이트박스 (게시글/공지/투표/불편신고 상세)
3. 댓글 이미지 썸네일 64px 정사각형으로 축소 (클릭 시 원본 표시)

- ImageLightbox 공통 컴포넌트로 중복 코드 통합
- 프론트엔드 + 백엔드 검증 로직 동시 수정

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use toast instead of page error for document download failure (#1314) (#1316)

When downloading a document fails (e.g. file not found on disk after
Cloud Run redeploy), the error was set on the page-level error state
which replaced the entire page with an error screen and "Back to Class
Materials" link. Now it shows a non-destructive toast notification
instead, keeping the page content visible.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
